subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-03 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: The soul of man must be happy, no matter where he is. One must attain to that condition of inward beatitude and peace
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @study; deepening, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
